description: Resumable content tracker for the AIPA documentation site. Lists baseline pages created and what remains for future SEO/content enrichment. Docusaurus ignores non-.md files in docs/, so this JSON is not published as a page.
stack: Docusaurus 3 (classic preset + Mermaid), React 19, TypeScript 6, yarn
categoriesDocumented: AI & Content (one category page covering 9 tools)
Finance & Health (one category page covering 3 grouped tools)
Learning & Collaboration (one category page covering 8 tools)
honestFramingNotes: AI features documented as BYO Google Gemini key — no developer-funded LLM.
Free client-side mechanisms (Web Speech API, client-side OCR) called out vs. Gemini-backed features.
Whiteboard real-time collaboration noted as requiring network/signaling; degrades to local.
Finance = not financial advice; Health = not medical advice / not a medical device.
File uploads documented as FilesHub; data under user's Firebase free-tier account.
remaining: Optional: one dedicated page per individual tool (40+ pages) for deeper SEO long-tail coverage.
Optional: more how-to guides (e.g. flashcards study, document scanning, QR sharing, mind mapping).
Optional: a Concepts section (architecture, data model, offline-first behavior).

nextBatch.suggestion: Add per-tool pages for the highest-search-demand Productivity + AI tools (tasks, notes, habit tracker, pomodoro, AI chat, writing assistant), 800-1000 words each, then wire into sidebars.ts under each category.
nextBatch.verifyBeforeUse: Cross-check tool list against /home/ahsan/Documents/01-code/projects/ai-personal-assistant/src/config/featureCatalog.ts before writing.
